subject: WAADA Year 2 Progress Report - Due Reminder
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, a reminder that your Year 2 progress report is due ahead of our June review. Kindly confirm the milestone summary.

subject: Re: Yam line selection - May data
body_preview: Thanks Layla, the Nairobi plots match your Enugu pattern well. Let us finalise the joint figure before the next call.

subject: Chapter 3 draft for your review
body_preview: Good afternoon Dr McBride. Attached is my Chapter 3 draft with the May yield analysis. Looking forward to your feedback.

subject: School fees reminder - Term 3
body_preview: Dear parent, this is a reminder that Term 3 fees of NGN 85,000 for Sophia McBride are due by the end of the month.

subject: Re: Q2 workshop logistics
body_preview: Layla, we have 287 farmers confirmed for the Nsukka session. Chidi will sort the seed kits. Can you bring the booklets?

subject: Manuscript submission guidelines
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, thank you for your interest. Please find the author guidelines and APC details for the West African Journal of Crop Research.

subject: Conference travel to Ibadan - approval
body_preview: Hi Layla, your travel request for the Oct WAITA visit to Ibadan has been approved by the Dean's office.

subject: Semester teaching timetable - CRP301
body_preview: Layla, the updated timetable keeps your CRP301 lectures Mon/Wed/Fri 9-11am. Please confirm you can cover the extension module.

subject: Re: Chapter 3 draft for your review
body_preview: Samuel, good progress. Tighten the methods section and revisit the moisture correction. Let us discuss at Friday supervision.

subject: Lab freezer maintenance scheduled
body_preview: Layla, technician coming Tuesday to service the -20 freezer after last week's alarm. I will supervise so your samples are safe.

subject: Re: Joint methods paper outline
body_preview: Layla, the outline looks strong. I can take the analysis section if you draft the field methods. Aim for a July internal draft?

subject: Q1 workshop attendance report
body_preview: Dr McBride, Q1 came in at 311 farmers across Nsukka and Udi. Full breakdown attached. We go plan better for Q2.

subject: MSc proposal feedback
body_preview: Good day Dr McBride. I have revised the sampling section as you advised. Please let me know if it is ready for the committee.

subject: Dean's office: faculty seminar schedule
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, you are invited to present at the faculty seminar series. Kindly propose a date and title for your cassava work.

subject: Happy New Year & 2026 plans
body_preview: Happy New Year Layla! Let us pencil the grant proposal timeline early. I am excited for the joint publications this year.

subject: WAADA Year 1 closeout - confirmation
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, we confirm sign-off on the Year 1 milestones for the cassava biofortification trial. Year 2 disbursement to follow.

subject: Re: Yam programme kick-off notes
body_preview: Layla, agreed on the roles. I will set up the bi-weekly Wed 3pm WAT calls and the shared Drive folder for WAITA-EACRI.

subject: Welcome to NNU Crop Science
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, welcome to the department. Your office and lab access are ready. I look forward to your contribution to our work.

subject: Grant disbursement received
body_preview: Hi Layla, the WAADA Year 2 tranche has been received by the research account. Please send the procurement plan when ready.

subject: Field site soil results - Udi
body_preview: Dr McBride, the Udi plot A1 soil results are in. pH and nitrogen within range. Spreadsheet uploaded to the shared folder.

subject: CSIR variety exchange - follow up
body_preview: Dear Layla, following our call, I can share two cassava accessions for your trial. Let me know the import permit requirements.

subject: Re: WAITA programme - Ibadan visit
body_preview: Dear Dr McBride, your 12-14 Oct visit to Ibadan is confirmed. Accommodation and the site tour agenda are attached.
